revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-330

The oscillation of a system in the absence of any exterior force.


Reference: I.E.C.


Note: Free oscillations of a mechanical system are usually called natural vibrations of the system.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Free oscillation}}
